text.title: agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Each agent instance consumes a full context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spawning 10 agents in parallel is costly. Use agent instances sparingly.

failure-mode.description: Agent descriptions drive auto-delegation; weak descriptions cause wrong agent selection.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Write action-oriented descriptions with clear keywords. Test by asking: would I use this agent if I saw this description?

failure-mode.description: bypassPermissions mode in agents runs without guardrails.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dangerous in automated pipelines. Use with extreme caution. Audit before granting.

failure-mode.description: Isolated context means agents cannot see the parent's conversation history unless explicitly passed.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pass context via Task tool prompt; reference files rather than inlining large content.

failure-mode.description: No built-in retry on agent failure.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Orchestrator must handle errors from the Task tool return value.

failure-mode.description: Agent files in .claude/agents/ are loaded at Claude Code startup; changes require session restart.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Plan session lifecycle carefully when developing agents.

failure-mode.description: Circular delegation: agent A spawns agent B which spawns agent A.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Causes infinite loops. Design delegation tree carefully.

failure-mode.description: Agent spawning 10 parallel instances blows context budget.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Each agent has a full context window. Use parallelism judiciously. Prefer sequential pipelines when possible.

failure-mode.description: Agent description is vague; auto-delegation selects wrong agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Write action-oriented descriptions with clear keywords. Test by asking: would I manually invoke this agent if I saw this description?

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents run without guardrails. Dangerous in automated pipelines. Use default or acceptEdits instead.

failure-mode.description: Inlining large content in Task prompt instead of referencing a file.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: This bloats subagent context. Instead, write content to a file; subagent reads via Read tool.

failure-mode.description: Agent file loaded at startup; changes require session restart.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Plan session lifecycle when developing agents. Consider restarting for safety.

failure-mode.description: Circular delegation: agent A spawns B which spawns A.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Results in infinite loops. Design delegation tree as a DAG with clear endpoints.

failure-mode.description: Agent with Bash tool and bypassPermissions mode.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Can delete files, push to remote, send network requests. Audit before granting.

failure-mode.description: Loading too many skills into agent's context frontmatter.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inflates context and degrades instruction-following. Load only essential skills.
